name: Your touch erases minds
description:
After finding a strange ring and an even stranger note with it. The note reads “with this, your touch will enslave all”. And now with a single touch, you erase anyone’s mind - making a blank, obedient slave. Physical contact with anyone will swiftly drain their mental capacities except for pure obedience to you.

…But you don’t know that yet. Now you sit in a coffee shop, waiting for your cute date to show up. You met Lily off a dating app, but will you test what the ring does on her? Test it on someone in the coffee shop before? Or leave entirely and go see if this ring’s power is even real in the first place?

tags: mind control, brainwashing, hypnosis, hypnotize, slave, sandbox
creator: AnonymousUserIsMe
